description: User clicks on the destination input field to see popular options
page_title: How exciting! Where are you travelling to?

description: User hovers over various popular destinations in the list, including Asia and Europe options
User selects 'United Kingdom' from the popular destinations list
User clicks the 'Continue' button to proceed with the selected destination
Page navigates to the Policy type selection screen
User clicks the back arrow button to return to the previous step
Page navigates back to the destination selection screen
page_title: How exciting! Where are you travelling to?

description: User clicks the destination input field again to add another country
User selects 'Italy' from the popular destinations list
User clicks the 'Continue' button with UK and Italy selected
Page navigates to the Policy type selection screen
User selects the 'Just one trip' policy option
User clicks the 'Continue' button after selecting policy type
Page navigates to the Travel dates selection screen
